CustomField.description: Ratio table that is set on the Supplemental Rent Rate and this is further used for the MR Calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Ratio table that is set on the Supplemental Rent Rate and this is further used for the MR Calculation.
CustomField.label: Current Ratio/Matrix table
CustomField.relationshipLabel: Supplemental Rent Utilization Rates (Current Ratio Table)
